================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 D7 96 7B 5B 4B
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1865
Reflected CC   : 0x5A
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 25

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1865
ReflectedCC  : 0x5A
PayloadLen   : 25

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1865

[PAYLOAD HEX]
50 94 EF 69 00 00 00 00 46 75 7B 44 7E C3 82 C3 
36 53 7B 44 84 92 DA C4 0F
